sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105036" key="trimelh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐμελής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n105036.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consisting of three</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μέλη, νόμος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1132d</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τριμερής.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
